top_signals.title: Speech by President von der Leyen at the European Parliament plenary debate on ‘High time to deliver on the Single Market, providing certainty and predictability for EU businesses and quality jobs'
top_signals.summary: European Commission Speech Strasbourg, 20 May 2026 You have chosen the Single Market as central debate topic today – that is very good. Our Single Market is more than a continental marketplace; it is a cornerstone of who we are as Europeans. It binds our citizens, our businesses and our values together. The free movement of goods, services, capital and people. It has delivered decades of growth, jobs and opportunities. It has created better choices for consumers, larger markets for businesses and higher standards across our Union.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Steelers QB Aaron Rodgers plans to retire after 2026 NFL season
top_signals.summary: The 42-year-old quarterback inked a one-year contract with the Pittsburgh Steelers this week ​that reunited him with coach Mike McCarthy.

top_signals.title: SAAM Towage to Acquire Five New Tugs from Sanmar Shipyards
top_signals.summary: SAAM Towage, a leading provider of marine support services in the Americas, has signed an agreement with Türkiye-based Sanmar Shipyards to acquire five new tugboats. The vessels will be gradually added to its fleet as part of its investment…

top_signals.title: GO Searcher Multi-Purpose Vessel Returns to Guice Offshore Fleet
top_signals.summary: Guice Offshore, a leader in the offshore maritime mini supply vessel specialty market, announced the return of GO Searcher to its fleet, bringing the total number of Guice Offshore-owned vessels to 19.The GO Searcher, which has played a role in pioneering aerospace operations since 2014…
